# host_macos_default (Resource)

Manages one macOS `defaults` key with a typed value.

Use this resource when you want a separate Terraform resource address for one defaults key. For larger preference sets, use `host_macos_defaults`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "host_macos_default" "dock_autohide" {
  domain = "com.apple.dock"
  key    = "autohide"
  bool   = true
}
```

## Value Attributes

Exactly one of `bool`, `int`, `float`, `string`, or `string_list` must be set.

## Restart Behavior

When `restart` is omitted, the provider applies built-in restarts for known domains such as Dock, Finder, SystemUIServer menu extras, global preferences, trackpad preferences, and accessibility preferences. Set `restart = []` to disable restarts for a specific default.

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `domain` (String) Defaults domain, such as `com.apple.dock`, `NSGlobalDomain`, or `com.apple.universalaccess`.
- `key` (String) Defaults key to manage inside the domain.

### Optional

- `bool` (Boolean) Boolean value. Exactly one of `bool`, `int`, `float`, `string`, or `string_list` must be set.
- `current_host` (Boolean) Use `defaults -currentHost` for host-specific preferences.
- `delete_on_destroy` (Boolean) Delete the managed defaults key on destroy. Defaults to false, leaving the current host setting in place.
- `float` (Number) Floating-point value. Exactly one of `bool`, `int`, `float`, `string`, or `string_list` must be set.
- `int` (Number) Integer value. Exactly one of `bool`, `int`, `float`, `string`, or `string_list` must be set.
- `restart` (List of String) Process names to restart with `killall` after writes or deletes, such as `Dock`, `Finder`, or `SystemUIServer`. Omit to use provider defaults for known domains; set `[]` to disable restarts.
- `string` (String) String value. Exactly one of `bool`, `int`, `float`, `string`, or `string_list` must be set.
- `string_list` (List of String) String array value. Exactly one of `bool`, `int`, `float`, `string`, or `string_list` must be set.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource identifier derived from `domain`, `key`, and `current_host`.
